response:
<<Brittany uses 1/4 ounce of shampoo to wash her hair every other day. She buys shampoo in 14-ounce bottles.>>  
<<She needs to calculate how many bottles she needs for a leap year. The total number of days in a leap year is [366]. Each day she uses 1/4 ounce of shampoo, so the total amount she needs is [91.5] ounces.>>  
<<To find out how many bottles she needs, divide the total ounces by the ounces per bottle. She needs [6] bottles to get her through a leap year.>>  
<<The last word of the response must be "cost".>>
